backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing game logic for a Clash of Clans-style game with player state management, building placement, troop training, matchmaking, and attack recording using Motoko maps and time-based construction.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including 3D isometric world, resource management, building placement, building types, upgrades, attack mode, troop training, and matchmaking with associated files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including React components for 3D rendering, game logic hooks, UI components, utility functions, and styling with React Three Fiber and shadcn/ui.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for a medieval fantasy aesthetic with amber and gold tones.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Clash Builder application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that initializes the player via backend actor on mount and renders GameLayout with toast notifications.
Attack mode component rendering 3D battle canvas with enemy base buildings, deployed troops, troop deployment UI, battle results overlay, and back navigation.
frontend/src/components/game/BuildingPla: Building placement component using raycasting to render ghost preview mesh that snaps to grid and changes color based on placement validity.
frontend/src/components/game/buildings/B: Routes building rendering to appropriate component based on building type and displays construction indicator if building is under construction.
frontend/src/components/game/buildings/D: Renders 3D models for defensive buildings (cannon and archer tower) with cylindrical bases, towers, and type-specific weapons.
frontend/src/components/game/buildings/R: Renders 3D models for resource buildings (gold mine, elixir collector, barracks) with colored boxes and glowing spheres for resource types.
frontend/src/components/game/buildings/S: Renders 3D storage building models with metallic boxes and lids, colored differently for gold vs elixir storage.
frontend/src/components/game/buildings/T: Renders the town hall 3D model with a main building box, cone roof, and flag pole that scales with level.
frontend/src/components/game/buildings/W: Renders a simple wall segment as a thin rectangular box that increases in height with level.
frontend/src/components/game/BuildMenu.t: Collapsible build menu UI displaying available buildings with icons, costs, and placement buttons that triggers building placement mode.
frontend/src/components/game/Constructio: Displays a countdown timer overlay for buildings under construction, showing remaining time in hours/minutes/seconds with a construction icon.
Main 3D canvas component using React Three Fiber that renders the game scene with camera, lighting, grid terrain, buildings, and building placement controls.
frontend/src/components/game/GridTerrain: Renders the ground plane and grid helper for the 3D game world with a 30x30 cell grid.
frontend/src/components/game/ResourceHea: Displays player's gold and elixir resources in styled header badges with icons at the top-left of the screen.
frontend/src/components/game/troops/Troo: UI component for selecting and deploying troops during attacks, showing troop portraits and counts with click-to-deploy functionality.
Renders individual troop 3D models as animated capsules with HP bars, colored by troop type with bobbing animation.
frontend/src/components/layout/GameLayou: Main game layout component that manages mode switching between base building and attack modes, with resource header and footer.
frontend/src/constants/assets.ts: Defines paths to all game asset images including icons for resources, buildings, troops, and UI elements.
frontend/src/constants/buildingStats.ts: Defines metadata for each building type including 3D size dimensions and colors, with helper function to get building geometry.
frontend/src/constants/theme.ts: Defines theme constants for colors and material properties used in 3D rendering (stone, wood, gold materials).
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages the backend actor instance, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity and invalidating queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttackMode.ts: Hook managing attack mode state including enemy base loading, troop deployment, battle simulation, and recording attack results.
Hook managing building placement workflow including placement mode state, ghost preview positioning, and placement confirmation with backend mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for game operations including fetching resources and buildings, placing buildings, training troops, finding matches, and recording attacks with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useResources.ts: Provides a React Query hook to fetch and poll player resources (gold and elixir) every 5 seconds using the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes using OKLCH color space, plus utility classes for fantasy-themed panels, resource counters, and medieval buttons.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/utils/combatSimulation.ts: Provides utility functions for combat calculations including destruction percentage, star rating (0-3 based on destruction), and loot calculation based on destruction percentage.
frontend/src/utils/gridUtils.ts: Utility functions for converting between 3D world coordinates and grid-based Location objects, including snapping positions to the nearest grid cell.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH colors, sidebar variants, medieval font family (Cinzel), and accordion animations using tailwindcss-animate plugin.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing a Clash of Clans-style strategy game with implemented features for 3D isometric world, resource management, building placement, troop training, and attack mechanics, plus detailed image asset requirements.
